name: Koenigsegg
description: NISMO has become the embodiment of Nissan's outstanding performance, inspired by the most unforgiving proving ground, the racetrack. A pure sports car experience packaged in an elegant body.

name: Nissan GT - R
description: Iconic Japanese supercar with twin-turbo V6 power. Designed for the racetrack and refined for the road. Pure adrenaline in every drive.

name: Rolls - Royce
description: The pinnacle of automotive luxury. Hand-crafted interior, whisper-quiet ride and timeless elegance for those who demand only the finest.

name: Nissan GT - R
description: Japan's flagship sport car. Track-tuned suspension and aerodynamics deliver razor-sharp handling. Available now at a special rental rate.

name: All New Rush
description: A versatile family SUV with rugged styling, spacious three-row seating and reliable performance. Perfect for road trips and weekend getaways.

name: CR - V
description: Honda's award-winning compact SUV. Refined cabin, fuel-efficient powertrain and class-leading cargo space make it the smart family choice.

name: All New Terios
description: Compact yet capable. The All New Terios combines SUV practicality with city-friendly dimensions and impressive fuel economy.

name: CR - V
description: Another flavor of the popular CR-V — premium trim with leather upholstery, panoramic roof and the latest driver-assist features.

name: MG ZX Exclusice
description: Sharp British design meets everyday practicality. The MG ZX Exclusice is a stylish hatchback packed with tech and comfort.

name: New MG ZS
description: Crossover with bold styling and a generous standard equipment list. The New MG ZS delivers premium feel at an affordable price.

name: MG ZX Excite
description: The sporty sibling of the ZX line. Tuned suspension, two-tone paint and an energetic driving character for urban adventurers.

name: New MG ZS
description: Another configuration of the popular New MG ZS — equipped with the panoramic sunroof package and 18-inch alloy wheels.

name: Koenigsegg Jesko
description: Hypercar engineering at its most extreme. Twin-turbo V8 producing over 1,600 horsepower and a top speed beyond imagination.

name: Rolls - Royce Phantom
description: The flagship Phantom — the ultimate expression of automotive luxury. Bespoke craftsmanship in every detail of cabin and exterior.
